column1: 飽くまでも自説を曲げなかった。
column2: あくまでもじせつをまげなかった。
column3: To the last, he did not bend his own argument.
column4: 飽くまでも (to the last, strictly, no matter what — firm insistence)
column5: 飽くまでも + [firm scope or insistence]
column6: 飽くまでも: firm insistence maintained through to the end
column7: 飽くまでも: firm insistence maintained through to the end
column8: 飽くまでも = firm persistent insistence (classical form); あくまでも = same (modern hiragana); どこまでも = to any extent; 最後まで = to the end
